hero.bio: Senior Solutions Architect and Frontend Specialist bridging the gap between high-performance engineering and visceral user experiences since 2010.

overview.bio: A trajectory forged in the furnace of 2010's web revolution. I transform complex business logic into surgical digital interfaces where UX quality isn't a metric, it's the foundation.
overview.card1Text: Initialized professional development in 2010, witnessing the evolution from static monoliths to reactive distributed systems.
overview.card2Text: Architecting for the human element. If the code is perfect but the user struggles, the system is broken.

jobs.description: Creation of web applications using Next.js and Nuxt.js. Development, maintenance and dissemination of a Design System with Web Components compatible with all frameworks, documented with Storybook.
Development of web applications for Fortune 500 clients. Stack: AWS S3, AWS Lambda, Next.js, TypeScript and React Native.
Web application development using Docker containers. Backend with PHP and Laravel, Frontend with Vue.js, React and Knockout. Reduced incidents by 60% and accelerated delivery by 40%.
